input_object: pauseRuns after stage5 and cfg; stage5 uses pauseRuns_raw via fit callee
extraction_rule: Non-extrema: cfg.AFM_metric_main height uses Dip_A; area uses DipAreaSelected vector. extrema_smoothed: abs(AFM_extrema_smoothed).
sign_or_magnitude_policy: non_negative_scalars_default_path; extrema uses abs on smoothed extremum
notes: Like labels Track A figure lane; not dip_signed or Dip_depth

background_or_reference: tanh FM step within STAGE5_FIT_PARAMETRIC window
extraction_rule: Y_FM equals FM_E vector default; extrema_smoothed uses FM_extrema_smoothed
notes: Mirrors FM_E when cfg selects fit branch

input_object: pauseRuns_raw through fitFMstep_plus_GaussianDip; optional stage4 Dip_area_direct per cfg.dipAreaSource
background_or_reference: Gaussian integrated area vs direct selection branch
extraction_rule: switch cfg.dipAreaSource legacy_fit default uses Dip_area_fit equals Dip_A times sqrt(2pi) times Dip_sigma; direct uses Dip_area_direct when finite

input_object: pauseRuns_raw DeltaM vs T_common in fit window around waitK
background_or_reference: tanh step on parametric background surface in wide window W
extraction_rule: stepWin equals Astep times tanh; stepAC equals stepWin minus mean(stepWin); FM_E equals sqrt(mean(stepAC squared omitnan))
notes: Not FM_abs; RMS of mean-centered tanh step on Twin
